entry.title: Owned in the shadows
entry.summary:
Author: Bobaeyedhamster

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,651Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 139

Summary: Touch what’s his, and you pay. Some have paid with their lives, learning what kind of man Bang Chan is—not just powerful, but possessive.In the shadows, a slow burn between Chan and his fixer, Minho, threatens to consume them both, unraveling years of silent desire.

entry.title: Love Our Way
entry.summary:
Author: Dimplesgirl2004

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,346Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Part two of Fate will intervene. Amelia and Minho have finally settled into their relationship after their rocky start. Soon they realize their relationship may not look like a typical relationship, especially when it comes to Chan and Jisung. All four of them must navigate this new dynamic and deal with all the feelings that come to the surface. Some handle that better than others.

entry.title: Overlap
entry.summary:
Author: odysseyofmemory

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 76,787Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 196

Summary: He smiles at her, one thousand Chans reflected one thousand times in the mirrored elevator walls. One thousands parallel universes where she could be in an elevator with Chan in Rome late at night, with his loverboy eyes, and how many of those universes are different? How many of those Chans have loverboy eyes? How many versions of her give in to them? How many good things actually happen to those versions after 2AM? or Everyone knows idols shouldn't date their staff. Chan's not sure if he cares anymore.

entry.title: ...but something's saying more please
entry.summary:
Author: I_Am_King02

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,270Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 26

Summary: "When he pulled the other man close and inhaled the scent he had grown so accustomed to, he felt himself relax. May come whatever the universe decided to give. As long as he could pull Felix close at the end of the day, nothing could shake him." Or Hyunjin is fighting a loosing battle when he first sees them. Suddenly the war is not that important anymore.

entry.title: My Guardian Angel
entry.summary:
Author: Yoncewcew

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,402Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Jisung is broken. He was broken by the hands of people who knew how to use them. He's escaped a toxic home, and a recent awful relationship, but he never truely healed. He spends everyday not knowing when things will get better, diving back into the relapse of self doubt. He's taunted with reminders, of people and events, when he finds someone. His "guardian angel", presented in the figure of a man. He grows everyday opening up. He's safe, he's loved. But it doesn't feel right. - Sorry this is kind of a pissy summary, I promise the actual story is good I just don't want to spoil it too much.WARNING/MINOR SPOILER!! This involves some mature content, read at your own risk, and I'm sorry but Bangchan is kind of the bad guy in this, and I'm not trying to depict him in a bad way at all, so please do not take this the wrong way. Also this is a fictional story, I'm not trying to ship any of the members in a religious way and this is all just my mind and a story I have come up with, not based on any personal or real life events. Also maybe a cheeky little plot tiwst.

entry.title: Testing The Limits
entry.summary:
Author: weirdquoki

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,184Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 326

Summary: The two had been in this arrangement for quite some time now, and it worked well for them. Chan helped Jisung remain punctual, tidy, and organized. He really improved Jisung's life, and he seemed happy to do so. In return, Jisung was always good for him, sugary sweet, halting under his touch.  It had always been like that with them. He didn't need anything to change…right? Or; Sweet and submissive Jisung wants to try his hand at being a brat. His dom, Chan, rises to the occasion.

entry.title: Glass Wings
entry.summary:
Author: TheDaisyRoots

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,789Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 676

Summary: A rag-tag group of gold-hearted criminals, the Stray Kids Gang is dominant heavy and in desperate need of a submissive to balance out their eros. Luckily, the latest stray brought in by their leader is the adorable touch starved sub, Lee Felix. When Felix bumps into dom Chan after months of self-neglect to his needs, instinct sends him to his knees — literally. With his health on the line, Felix reluctantly agrees to stay with the eros until he can recover, but quickly becomes attached to everyone — everyone except intimidating dom Hyunjin, who grows increasingly agitated by Felix’s attitude. Can Felix swallow his pride long enough to allow Hyunjin to care for him, too?•~• ʚïɞ •~•OR; Traumatized sub Felix learns how to accept himself through the love of his new eros — after Hyunjin tames the brat out of him. OT8, with main emphasis on Hyunlix and Chanlix.

entry.title: Sometimes it's too much, Sometimes it's not Enough
entry.summary:
Author: MinAreum3

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 47,482Chapters: 7/9Kudos: 145

Summary: Minho and Han were happy. Happy with how beautiful Jisung sounded when he begged Minho to let him come, how good Minho's dick felt, especially when he fucked the anxiety out of him, you get it.One subdrop, a few panic attacks and lots of due conversations later, Chan's in for a ride he didn't even remember getting on. But if it gets him one more clingy sub, who is he to complain?

entry.title: Lucky Girl
entry.summary:
Author: karmaswhiskee

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 138,085Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 185

Summary: “GIRL!” Alicia unleashes a muffled scream. “You fucking won! Oh my God, you fucking actually won!”“Dude, what? What did I win?”“The competition to become the ‘9th member’ of Stray Kids for a year! This is the letter babe! Oh my god, I need autographs, you have to promise!”I sigh. “Alicia, slow down. I know they’re having this competition, but I didn’t enter, so this literally cannot be real.”“That’s because we entered for you!”Every sound around me suddenly disappears; all I can hear is the thudding pulse in my eardrums. No way. “Wha-what? Who’s we?”“Okay. Remember how I told you this was a special birthday and that you’d never forget your twenty-first?”“Yes…”
